name: Vacancy migration energy Ev
note: From Dimitrov & Dimitrov resistivity; Kuramoto positron annihilation gave 1.36 eV

name: Interstitial diffusion coefficient Di
note: Interstitial mobility much higher than vacancy

name: Cascade escape fraction eta
note: For fast neutron cascade damage in FFTF

name: Dislocation bias factor ratio Zi_disl/Zv_disl
note: Upper bound 2.0 from Sniegowski & Wolfer; Tenbrink found 0.1-0.45 net bias

name: Steady-state void swelling rate
note: Independent of dose rate; consistent with EBR-II and commercial reactor data

name: Dose rate range
note: Over two orders of magnitude variation
